raw_source.title: [Beijing/USA-SanJose] FalconTalent——LLM startup business is looking for onsite full time_Data Engineer Lead
raw_source.body:
## About
This position is for my company——FalconTalent.
https://www.falcontalent.com/

Our LLM business is under angel round. Already published Demo. Our CTO is of Purdue University PhD of LLM major.

## Requirements
Now I am looking for a young talent of 1~5 years' working experience to base Beijing or USA San Jose. (but we dont support VISA) To take leadership of the data engineering responsibilities.

You must have:

data engineering <ETL/optimize data pipeline, Python>
A global Vision (because we donnt only do China business)
Good English communication
Enterpreneurship

## What you 'll again

CNY 30-40K monthly (can discuss options if you are the very right person)
Transfer and join in the LLM area. Perhaps you will join a hot and money-flowing track.(or premature to say)
Lead the current Data team

## Work Location
Beijing or USA San Jose, - Full-time onsite only


## Contact
my wechat ID: ArcoDeTriunfo
**Please donnt say nothing after connecting. I dont need wechat user but I am happy to know friends.
